title: Exemption of Service Vehicles from Registration and Licensing Provisions Notice, 1948
title_en: Exemption of Service Vehicles from Registration and Licensing Provisions Notice, 1948

provisions.content: Any Service motor vehicle or carriage is hereby exempted from the operation of all the provisions of the Traffic Act 1 relating to the registration and licensing of motor vehicles and carriages. 1 Cap. 168

For the purposes of this Notice "Service motor vehicle or carriage" means a motor vehicle or carriage the property of any of the Defence Forces of the United Republic and carrying a Service registration number and licence.
